prestazioni: Engine swap to a bespoke **Ford Coyote V8 (Aluminator XS, 5.2L)** with a **Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox**, replacing the original **Ford 5.0L V8 (code: Coyote Gen 3)** for a 700+ HP output via a **ProCharger P-1SC-1 supercharger** (12 psi boost) with a **VMP Racing intercooler core** and **ID1000x injectors**

Full **AP Racing CP8450 brake kit** with **6-piston calipers (front) and 4-piston (rear)**, paired with **Brembo HTC-64T high-carbon rotors (410mm front, 380mm rear)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads** for endurance-level stopping power

Custom **KW Suspension V5R coilovers** with **3-way adjustable damping (rebound, compression, preload)**, **Eibach ERS race springs (1200 lb/in front, 1000 lb/in rear)**, and **Monoball spherical bearings** for subframe and control arm mounts to eliminate compliance
estetica: Full **RML Group carbon fiber body kit** (P72-specific aero package) including a **dual-element rear wing (Gurney flap adjustable)**, **front splitter with integrated dive planes**, and **rear diffuser with active air curtains** for downforce optimization

**HRE FF16 wheels (19x12 front, 20x13 rear)** in **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (285/35 R19 front, 335/30 R20 rear)** with **custom center-lock adapters** for quick swaps

**LED taillight conversion by JW Speaker (Model 8700 ECE)** with **sequential turn signals** and **carbon fiber housing**, paired with **Oracle Lighting RGB halo headlights (Adaptive LED projectors)** for aggressive yet functional illumination
